Author: KKT
Name: SoundMixer
Punchline: Advanced FFXIV Sound Effect Volume Mixer
Description:
Per-SCD-path volume control for FFXIV sound effects.

Features:
- Custom groups with Glob path patterns, drag-and-drop nesting, and root-group colors
- Presets for different group and volume layouts
- Live monitor with collapsible panels, hide-matched/hide-keyword filters, and unknown/ path fixes
- BGM and weather/ambient loop hooks with per-group and global refresh
- IPC temporary overrides for external plugins (tag + priority, session-only)
- Group tree shows stacked effective volume; IPC overrides highlighted in green
- 0-200% linear gain; Expert Mode up to 350% (audible engine cap)
- Chinese / English localization

Commands: /soundmixer, /smix
Changelog:
v0.2.3.7
- Performance: SetVolume/GetVolume skip path resolve when tracked or all volumes 100%; active list scan every 2 frames (tracked enforce every frame); dedupe list tracked pass; throttle prune/monitor maintenance

v0.2.3.6
- Footstep active-list enforce interval: every 10 frames (was 3)

v0.2.3.5
- Performance: single pass over active SoundData list (was 3 scans/frame); reuse visit HashSet; per-node enforce cache; footstep enforce every 3 frames
- Invalidate enforce cache on zone change, clear cache, and group volume refresh

v0.2.3.4
- Child groups: ScaleByFather option (inherit parent volume, on by default); uncheck to use only this group's volume
- Config migration v9 from legacy ApplyToChildren

v0.2.3.3
- Fix parent group volume not applying to child-matched sounds: ancestor chain now multiplies when ApplyToChildren is on (战斗/环境等无 glob 的父组生效)
- Enforcement, monitor log, and group-tree effective % now match the same stacked math

v0.2.3.2
- Fix mod music path split: auto-alias short sound/*.scd to full visual mod path so monitor log and enforcement share one multiplier
- Scds cache keeps the longer mod path; LoadSoundFile no longer overwrites GetResource full path with short FileName
- Fix volume baseline pollution: LastGameVolume tracks native play volume so >100% boost can scale up after a quiet start
- >100% boost: field-first ApplyEngineVolume, BypassVolumeRules, skip fade-in wait during enforcement
- Debug tab: optional extreme volume debug (up to 10000% engine cap)
- PlaySound when enabled: post-play path upgrade from SoundData; mod /music/ paths use ForceRefresh; boost plays with BypassVolumeRules

v0.2.3.1
- Removed Safe Mode toggle: path resolve and enforcement always use safe reads (no ISoundData.GetFileName)
- Fix load-time CTD: SoundEnforcement uses TryResolveSafeSoundPath only
- Fix nested footstep child groups without PlaySound hook; stacked parent+child multipliers
- Footsteps: Scds material path when FileName is foot container; skip setup indices, scale playback /1 only
- Config migration v8; see POSTMORTEM_0.2.3.1.md in repo

v0.2.3.0
- PlaySound hook disabled by default (confirmed CTD); danger notice in Debug tab; All On keeps it off
- Fix UI one-shot sounds muted after group volume changes; toolbar Clear Cache button
- Guideroid grace no longer suspends SetVolume/GetVolume; ride BGM volume applies while mounted
- Group tree effective volume from own path rules only; color sync only when parent changes
- Removed redundant PlaySound CTD guards; official action guards rev3

v0.2.2.15
- Fix group drag not starting: BeginDragDropSource must follow row widget immediately (before context popup).

v0.2.2.14
- Fix group drag reorder: top/bottom edge = Before/After, middle = nest; capture drop intent before AcceptDragDropPayload.

v0.2.2.13
- Fix BGM/streaming music volume not updating while playing: track play path, safe path resolve, live enforce + refresh.
- Auto-add **/bgm/** glob to built-in BGM group when missing.

v0.2.2.12
- Fix NullReferenceException when starting a group drag (guard invalid AcceptDragDropPayload).

v0.2.2.11
- Fix CTD / game won't launch after dragging groups to reorder: drop applies once on release (was repeating every hover frame + Save spam); auto-repair corrupted hierarchy on load.

v0.2.2.10
- Fix old preset volumes still applying after switching presets: runtime snapshot now reads live config for the active preset; clear tracked SoundData and refresh all active sounds on switch.

v0.2.2.9
- Fix occasional Access Denied crash when dragging volume sliders: defer disk save until mouse release; catch save failures so ImGui Draw() does not abort.

v0.2.2.8
- Fix BGM slider not applying live: 0.2.2.7 removed unconditional hook Enable() but ApplyMountSafeHookState never re-enabled hooks when not suppressed.
- RefreshGroupSounds/RefreshAll no longer fully blocked while mounted (only active-list scans skipped); weather refresh always allowed.

v0.2.2.7
- Fix all-mount crash (never rode Guideroid): skip ActiveSoundData list scan and SetVolume/GetVolume path resolution while mounted; play hooks still mix footsteps when Safe Mode is off.
- Fix Enable() unconditionally re-enabling all hooks on every IPC refresh (hook flicker while mounted).

v0.2.2.6
- Fix non-Guideroid mount crash: grace no longer latched to any mount; chocobo mount clears stale grace; Guideroid uses volume-hook-only suspend.

v0.2.2.5
- Guideroid-only blacklist guard; Safe Mode default on; IPC refresh gated during Guideroid safety.

v0.2.2.4
- Guideroid: auto-suspend ALL audio hooks while mounted with official blacklist; skip per-frame SoundData maintenance.

v0.2.2.3
- Fix Guideroid crash: stop ActiveSoundData list scan on blacklist bypass; skip SoundData writes while mounted with official rules.
- Toolbar shows assembly version.

v0.2.2.2
- Suspend SetVolume/GetVolume on mount-loop blacklist.

v0.2.2.1
- Fix official blacklist always showing rev 0: JsonProperty mappings for embedded/remote JSON
- Restore SoundVolumeHelper.TryGetPathFromSoundData; official sync saves on main thread

v0.2.2.0
- Safe Mode (optional): suspend all audio hooks during mount/dismount when enabled; off by default so mount mixing still works
- Blacklist tab: manual fetch for official list (10s cooldown)

v0.2.1.9
- Official blacklist notes: bilingual zh/en in OfficialSoundBlacklist.json; UI follows language setting

v0.2.1.8
- Dedicated Blacklist tab: editable user entries (keyword/path/glob + note) vs read-only official list
- Official list auto-synced from GitHub on startup

v0.2.1.7
- Initial blacklist prototype

v0.2.1.6
- Suspend ALL audio hooks (play + SetVolume + resource) for entire mounted period
- Skip RefreshGroupSounds / active-sound list scans during mount (fixes HeelsDesignLinker IPC hammering footsteps while on Guideroid)
- Apply mount guard before IPC-driven Enable()

v0.2.1.5
- Physically disable SetVolume/GetVolume vtable hooks during mount transition (not just detour passthrough)
- Early mount guard when mount SFX paths play (before Mounted/Mounting flags)
- 5s grace after mount/dismount; IPC re-enable respects guard

v0.2.1.4
- Passthrough audio hooks while mounted and during mount/dismount transitions; SetVolume always calls Original on transitional nodes

v0.2.1.3
- Fix Guideroid mount crash when enabling plugin: no GetFileName on active scan, tracked-only enforcement, skip enable-time full refresh

v0.2.1.2
- Fix mount/dismount crashes: safer SetVolume/GetVolume hooks, skip field writes during native fades, no re-entrant SetVolume Original from enforcement

v0.2.1.1
- Fix Framework.Update crashes when live monitor or volume enforcement scans freed SoundData native pointers
- VirtualQuery memory validation before dereferencing; unified safe linked-list traversal

v0.2.1.0
- Resizable UI splitters: drag between top controls and main content, and between group tree and details (Glamourer/OtterGui-style handles)
- Persist TopPanelHeight and LeftPanelWidth; save on drag release
- Auto-save main window position/size while moving or resizing
- Auto-save group tree expand/collapse state

v0.2.0
- IPC temporary override API for external plugins (tag + priority, cleared on logout)
- Collapsible Recent / IPC override panels (always visible, not dismissible)
- Group tree shows stacked effective volume; green override labels for IPC
- IPC panel lists overrides by tag with clear-one and clear-all actions
- Play hooks resolve via ClientStructs MemberFunctionPointers; single Info when unavailable
- Live monitor scan crash guards; KNOWN_ISSUES.md documents CN signature gaps
- Release zip ships DotNet.Glob.dll alongside plugin (no ILRepack merge)

v0.1.0
- Per-SCD-path volume mixing with groups, Glob patterns, and presets
- Nested groups, drag-and-drop ordering, and root-group label colors
- BGM / weather-ambient support with refresh actions
- Live monitor, filters, path aliases, and expert mode (350% cap)

FeedbackMessage: Please include steps to reproduce and the sound path if reporting a matching issue.
